evals.prompt: 四组处理的数据，做方差分析然后画柱状图。
evals.expected_output: chart anova → chart duncan → chart bar
assertions: nong chart anova <groups.json> --json returns status: ok with F and P values
nong chart duncan <groups.json> --json returns status: ok with significance letters
nong chart bar <groups.json> -o <out.png> --json returns status: ok, PNG file exists

evals.prompt: 画个箱线图看四组数据的分布。
assertions: nong chart boxplot <groups.json> -o <out.png> --json returns status: ok
PNG output file exists with size > 100 bytes
expectations: Box plot does not need ANOVA first; it visualizes distribution directly
